name: Classic Hershey Bar Cake
recipeIngredient: 6 Hershey's milk chocolate bars (1.55 oz each, melted)
recipeInstructions:
Heat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease and flour a 10-inch tube pan or 12-cup fluted tube pan. In a large mixer bowl, beat butter until creamy; gradually add granulated sugar, beating on medium speed of an electric mixer until well blended. Add eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition. Add chocolate; beat until blended. Stir together flour, baking soda and salt; add to chocolate mixture alternately with buttermilk, beating until blended. Add syrup and vanilla; beat until blended. Stir in pecans. Pour batter into prepared pan. Bake 1 hour and 15 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center of the cake comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes; remove from pan to a wire rack. Cool completely. Sift powdered sugar over top, if desired.
To make sour milk: Use 1 tablespoon white vinegar plus milk to equal 1 cup.
